zh.Norton Hauteville, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特諾頓 聖 菲利普
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gorrana De Crepon於大約1240年出生在義大利拉其時，她的父親Count Rinaldo or Rainaldo D' Aquino93歲，母親Cecilia di Medania116歲。她和Aaron Fitzrogers I至少有6個兒子。她去世於1313年在義大利享年74歲。

zh-hans.Norton Hauteville, Somerset, England: 英国英格兰薩默塞特諾頓 聖 菲利普
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gorrana De Crepon于大约1240年出生在意大利拉其时，她的父亲Count Rinaldo or Rainaldo D' Aquino93岁，母亲Cecilia di Medania116岁。她和Aaron Fitzrogers I至少有6个儿子。她去世于1313年在意大利享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Crepon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English or Scottish: unexplained. Compare   Creason  .

variants.name: Creason
meanings: English or Scottish: unexplained. Compare   Creson  .
Alternatively, perhaps an Americanized form of Dutch Cruijsen, or one of its variants such as Kruijssen or Creusen, habitational names based on Dutch kruis ‘cross’ (compare Crusan and Kruis ).

en.lifeSummary: When Gorrana De Crepon was born about 1240, in Lazio, Italy, her father, Count Rinaldo or Rainaldo D' Aquino, was 93 and her mother, Cecilia di Medania, was 116. She had at least 6 sons with Aaron Fitzrogers I. She died in 1313, in Italy, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gorrana De Crepon est née environ 1240, à Lazio, Italie, son père, Count Rinaldo or Rainaldo D' Aquino, avait 93 ans et sa mère, Cecilia di Medania, avait 116 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils avec Aaron Fitzrogers I. Elle est décédée en 1313, à Italie, à l’âge de 74 ans.
